questions: What is the GARM Brand Safety and Suitability framework?
How do we operationalize brand safety and suitability?
qa.answer: GARM defines a common taxonomy and risk levels for content adjacency, enabling consistent controls across platforms for both brand safety (hard exclusions) and suitability (contextual tolerance).
implication: Adopt GARM categories and risk tiers in platform settings and allowlists/blocklists.
Set different suitability levels by campaign objective and brand tolerance.
Audit placements and supply partners for compliance against GARM definitions.
